Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.autoTacticExtentionTests

Class AutoTacticRegistryTest

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.autoTacticExtentionTests.AutoTacticRegistryTest
public class AutoTacticRegistryTest extends Object
Unit tests for the tactic registry

  • Method Details

    • assertKnown

      private void assertKnown(String id)
      Asserts that the given tactic id has been registered. This is checked using both inquiry methods IAutoTacticRegistry.isRegistered(String) and IAutoTacticRegistry.getRegisteredIDs().
      Parameters:
      id - the tactic id to check

    • assertNotKnown

      private void assertNotKnown(String id)
      Asserts that the given tactic id has not been registered yet. This is checked using both inquiry methods IAutoTacticRegistry.isRegistered(String) and IAutoTacticRegistry.getRegisteredIDs().
      Parameters:
      id - the tactic id to check

    • assertParameterizerLoadingFailure

      private void assertParameterizerLoadingFailure(String id)
